seoTitle: Dulwich vs Duncan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dulwich and Duncan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dulwich and Duncan.
heading: Dulwich vs Duncan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dulwich, South Australia and Duncan, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dulwich has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Duncan (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dulwich or Duncan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dulwich has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Duncan scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dulwich scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Duncan scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dulwich or Duncan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dulwich has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
